name: dptech-fw-v4-6-10
description: OctoBus package for DPtech FW V4.6.10 packet filter, address group, and security policy APIs.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/GetPacke.name: get-packet-filter-status
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/GetPacke.description: Query the DPtech FW packet filter immediate-effect status.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/EnablePa.name: enable-packet-filter-immediate
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/EnablePa.description: Enable DPtech FW packet filter immediate-effect mode.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/ListAddr.name: list-address-groups
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/ListAddr.description: List DPtech FW address groups by name keyword.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/CreateAd.name: create-address-group
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/CreateAd.description: Create a DPtech FW address group.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/UpdateAd.name: update-address-group
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/UpdateAd.description: Update a DPtech FW address group.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/DeleteAd.name: delete-address-group
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/DeleteAd.description: Delete a DPtech FW address group.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/GetSecur.name: get-security-policy
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/GetSecur.description: Get DPtech FW security policy details.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/CreateSe.name: create-security-policy
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/CreateSe.description: Create a DPtech FW security policy.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/UpdateSe.name: update-security-policy
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/UpdateSe.description: Update a DPtech FW security policy.

DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/DeleteSe.name: delete-security-policy
DPtech_FW_V4610.DPtech_FW_V4610/DeleteSe.description: Delete a DPtech FW security policy.
